channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude AI can respond with charts, diagrams, and other visuals now
item.description: Anthropic's latest update to Claude will allow the AI chatbot to generate custom charts, diagrams, and other visualizations during your conversation. If Claude determines a visual is useful based on the context of your chat, it will insert the image in-line, rather than in its side panel. As an example, Anthropic says a conversation about […]

item.title: The first three Tomb Raider games just launched on mobile with all DLC and loads of new content — 'We’re providing an incredible amount of value in one package,' says developer
item.description: Tomb Raider 1-3 Remastered has arrived on mobile alongside a big free update for other platforms.

item.title: Google’s Pixel 10a proves you don’t need big upgrades to make a great phone
item.description: We spent over a week with the Pixel 10a – Google's new entry-level smartphone – putting it through its paces to see how it performs, and it remains one of the best budget options. Read on for TechRadar's full review.

item.title: Claude can now generate charts and diagrams
item.description: With Claude enjoying a moment of newfound popularity among regular people, Anthropic is previewing an update designed to make its chatbot better at explaining some concepts. Starting today, Claude can generate charts and diagrams as part of its responses, either when asked directly or when it decides visuals might be helpful to the user. For example, try asking Claude what's the best way to fold a paper plane. Where previously it was limited to text, now it can show you step by step how to fold a Nakamura lock plane. Anthropic is quick to point out what it's introducing today isn't image gener...

item.title: Peut-on vraiment jouer sur le MacBook Neo ?
item.description: Le MacBook Neo est un petit ordinateur capable de bien des choses, mais il s'agirait tout de même de ne pas lui demander l'impossible. Comme de faire tourner des gros jeux AAA qui mettent à genoux des PC bien mieux équipés ! Néanmoins, les joueurs moins exigeants pourront y trouver leur compte.

item.title: Honda cancels three EVs that were months away from US production
item.description: Honda has announced it is canceling three electric vehicles it was months from starting production on at its EV Hub in Ohio. The Honda 0 SUV, the Honda 0 sedan and the Acura RSX are all being wound down. The company showed off all three models, and touted them as in near-production form at CES 2025. Unlike the Honda Prologue and Acura ZDX, which run on GM's Ultium platform, the scrapped models were built on Honda's own Zero platform and would have been its first fully in-house EVs. Honda in part blamed the elimination of federal EV tax credits, eased fossil fuel regulations and US tariffs for ...

item.title: This stunning Samsung QLED TV just crashed to its lowest price yet at Amazon's Spring Sale — save 44% for a limited time
item.description: Amazon's UK Spring Sale has the stunning Samsung 55-inch QLED TV on sale for a record-low price of £331, thanks to an impressive 44% discount.

item.title: How to Watch the 2026 Oscars and Who Prediction Markets Are Betting On
item.description: The Oscars will be streaming for the first time on Hulu this year.

item.title: Google built a flash-flood prediction tool using Gemini and old news reports
item.description: Flash floods are notoriously difficult to predict, but Google might have a novel solution. The company just revealed Groundsource, a prediction tool for flash floods that uses Gemini to source data from old news reports. This is the first time it has used a language model for this type of work. Flash flood prediction models need historical data and model training that often doesn't exist. Our solution: Groundsource, a new AI-powered methodology that uses Gemini to transform 5M+ global reports into a precise dataset of 2.6M+ flood events.This provides a massive,…— Google Research (@GoogleResear...

item.title: Microsoft has reportedly pulled the plug on its strange ‘This is an Xbox’ marketing push
item.description: Microsoft has seemingly retired its odd 'This is an Xbox' marketing campaign following new leadership changes.

item.title: 'The analog switches are a dream' — why now's the time to pick up one of the best gaming keyboards I've ever used
item.description: The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Gen 3 has been one of my favorite gaming keyboards for a while — and now it's 24% off in Amazon's Spring Deal Days event.

item.title: Honda tue ses 2 voitures électriques très attendues : que cache cette décision à plusieurs milliards ?
item.description: À quelques mois seulement du lancement de ses premières voitures électriques de nouvelle génération, Honda active le freinage d'urgence. Une décision sans doute mûrement réfléchie mais qui vient ici repousser, voire annuler deux produits plutôt originaux dans un univers où les autos ont toutes tendance à se ressembler aujourd'hui.

item.title: Another worrying WordPress plugin security flaw could put 250,000 websites at risk
item.description: WordPress plugin Ally was carrying an SQL injection flaw that allowed data exfiltration.

item.title: Bracing for the Apocalypse? Doomsday Preppers Say You’ll Need These Treats
item.description: It’s not just sardines and dried beans. Self-identified preppers are also stashing luxuries like coffee and chocolate.

item.title: The Xbox Is Now a PC. Every PC Is Now an Xbox
item.description: Xbox still has a lot to prove.

item.title: Amazon lâche ce laptop gaming 144 Hz avec un Core i5 et une RTX 5060 pour 959 €, une affaire avec la flambée du prix des composants
item.description: Le Lenovo LOQ 15IRX10 est un PC portable gaming avec un bon rapport performances/prix pour les joueurs qui veulent de la Full HD fluide à 144 Hz à retrouver pour 959,99 euros au lieu de 1 199,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: The New ‘Disclosure Day’ Trailer Cracks Its Alien Mystery Wide Open
item.description: Steven Spielberg's next summer blockbuster, starring Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, and Colman Domingo, releases this June.

item.title: This new style of leadership is the key to attracting and keeping top talent today
item.description: It’s called ‘Inside Out’ leadership, and here’s what it’s all about. The ancient world understood that leaders who act without self-knowledge create chaos. Consider that at the entrance to the Oracle of Delphi was the following inscription: “Know thyself.” Socrates further imbued meaning into this tenet by declaring that his wisdom came from knowing that he knew nothing. Later, Stoics like Marcus Aurelius argued that self-knowledge meant acknowledging what was actually within your control. The throughline across millennia is clear: cultivating inner clarity helps us navigate external uncertain...

item.title: Meta exec hopes VR teens will stick around
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. "It is a pretty rough time for the game industry." Meta Reality Labs director of games Chris Pruett did not mince words when he returned to GDC for his annual […]

item.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark to turn every employee into an AI agent builder
item.description: Benchmark’s new patner Everett Randell, sees enterprise automation as the largest opportunity in AI.

item.title: Google Maps passe à la « navigation immersive » et ça change tout
item.description: La célèbre application Maps de Google s'offre une grosse mise à jour de l'expérience de navigation en voiture. Elle devient plus pratique.

item.title: Microsoft's Copilot Health can use AI to turn your fitness data and medical records 'into a coherent story'
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Copilot Health, an AI-powered tool it claims can help make sense of your medical records, health history and fitness data from wearables, should you grant it access to that information. The company said it will be in a "separate, secure space" in the Copilot app and that the idea is to help provide you with more context and insights so you can ask your doctor the right questions when you see them.Copilot Health is designed to help you better understand your medical information as a whole, Microsoft says. It is not "intended to diagnose, treat or prevent diseases or other...

item.title: Microsoft’s head of experiences and devices is retiring, triggering a shakeup
item.description: Rajesh Jha, executive vice president of Microsoft's experiences and devices group, is retiring after more than 35 years at the software giant. Jha was a big part of the team that helped move Microsoft's Office suite to the cloud, and has recently been overseeing Microsoft 365 Copilot, Windows, Office, and more. "After 35+ years at […]

item.title: PEGI’s new age ratings will restrict FC 27 to kids over 16
item.description: The Pan-European Game Information (PEGI) body previously assigned its age ratings based on the presence of sex, drugs, violence, bad language, and fear. Now it's adding four new options that tie age suitability to interactive features, like rating games that contain loot boxes as unsuitable for children under 16. Games like EA's FC series - […]

item.title: Alexa+ gets a new ‘adults only’ personality option that curses but won’t get into NSFW content
item.description: The new Sassy style can curse and roast you, but the fun ends there.

item.title: Amazon's UK Spring Sale is slashing prices on Apple devices — MacBook Neo, AirPods 4, and Apple Watch 11 from £99
item.description: Amazon's Spring Sale offers record-low prices on new and existing Apple devices, including the MacBook Neo, AirPods 4, Apple Watch 11, and more.

item.title: WordPress launches an in-browser website creator
item.description: WordPress.org is launching a new tool that lets you create a private website directly in your browser, according to an announcement on Wednesday. You can access the tool by heading to my.WordPress.net, which opens up a workspace where you can start building a website without signing up to WordPress, choosing a hosting plan, or selecting […]

item.title: Disney+ s’essaie à la vidéo verticale pour retenir ses abonnés
item.description: Disney+ n'est pas allé chercher très loin sa prochaine nouveauté : le service de streaming va en effet proposer des vidéos au format vertical histoire de faire mousser l'engagement des abonnés. Comme chez TikTok, Instagram, ou encore… Netflix.

item.title: Wonderful raises $150M Series B at $2B valuation
item.description: The funding round, led by Insight Partners, comes just four months after Wonderful raised a $100 million Series A.

item.title: Meta Hopes Mini Games Will Make You Forget Its Smart Glasses Are Recording You Naked
item.description: Games are the last thing Meta's smart glasses need right now.

item.title: Uber is shooting for even more upscale clientele with Uber Elite
item.description: Uber has launched a new invite-only luxury ride experience called Uber Elite. Aimed at "executives, frequent travelers, and riders looking for a more elevated experience," it sounds like an upgraded version of Uber Black for the, well, uber-rich. A ride booked through Uber Elite will be operated by a professional chauffeur driving a new-model luxury vehicle less than three years old. An Elite-only "Meet and Greet" feature allows riders to pre-arrange to be picked up in the airport terminal they arrive at from a flight, with their chauffeur dutifully awaiting them at baggage claim. Uber says al...

item.title: Russia's state-backed MAX app may know if you are using a VPN to bypass censorship — here is everything we know
item.description: Russia's digital rights group, RKS Global, urges removing the MAX app from any device where a VPN is used, warning that other VK-developed apps are likely to include such functionality.

item.title: Don't wait for the rumored DJI Pocket 4 — the 'amazing' Pocket 3 is cheaper than ever right now
item.description: DJI's top-selling Pocket 3 vlogging camera falls in price and it's a great buy, even with the rumored Pocket 4 upgrade potentially on the horizon

item.title: Rivian R2 launch: Here’s what $57,990 gets you
item.description: Two years after revealing what its affordable next-generation EV would look like, Rivian has shared all of the pricing, colors, and performance specs for its upcoming R2 SUV. And like so many new car releases, it’s complicated. The bottom line: Rivian’s bid to sell a more affordable EV that is accessible to a broader market […]

item.title: Are EVs the solution for drivers dodging the war’s spike on energy prices?
item.description: Although EV owners are mostly shielded from the rising cost of gas, electricity prices have been surging nationally. When Kevin Ketels bought an electric 2026 Chevrolet Blazer last year, he wasn’t thinking about the cost of gas. He just thought EVs were better and “wanted to be part of the future.” Now that the Iran war is spiking prices at the pump, the Detroit man is happy he is no longer filling up his 11-year-old gas-powered SUV.“Electricity can go up, but it won’t go up nearly as much as gas will and it won’t go up nearly as fast, either,” said Ketels, 55, an assistant professor of global...

item.title: Ed Sheeran Looks Back on Everyone Hating His ‘Game of Thrones’ Cameo
item.description: Ed Sheeran is aware of the effect he has on people, in Westeros or otherwise.

item.title: Rivian R2 prices revealed: you’re going to have to wait longer for that $45,000 version
item.description: When Rivian first revealed the R2 in 2024, a lot of the excitement was centered on the starting price of $45,000 - placing it slightly below the current average selling price for a new internal combustion vehicle. Finally, here was a decently sized electric SUV with great design and impressive software that wouldn't require taking […]

item.title: Dyson’s new stain-spotting AI robovac is now available
item.description: Dyson's latest autonomous robot vacuum cleaner first debuted during IFA 2025 in Berlin last September. The Spot+Scrub Ai Robot is the company's follow-up to its 360 Vis Nav robovac launched in 2023 with upgrades that include a new self-cleaning roller mop, a multifunction dock, and lasers that can identify stains. It's available now through Dyson's […]...

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, March 13 (game #1509)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, March 13 (game #1006)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, March 13 (game #740)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Rivian's R2 EV arrives this spring with a $58,000 price tag
item.description: Ahead of its official release later this spring, today Rivan is announcing full pricing and trim levels for its long-awaited R2 electric SUV. The rollout for the company's first mid-size (two-row) offering will be similar to its previous vehicles, with more expensive premium models hitting the road first this spring, followed by more affordable configurations becoming available later this year and into 2027. This timeline is especially important for anyone hoping to snag the $45,000 base model of the R2, which isn't expected to go on sale until sometime in late 2027. The R2 Performance with La...

item.title: Uber, Wayve, and Nissan plan to launch a robotaxi service in Tokyo this year
item.description: Nissan will integrate Wayve's self-driving software into the Leaf with the goal of making the vehicles available on the Uber app in Tokyo.

item.title: Honda cancels Zero Series EVs, citing ‘extremely challenging’ situation
item.description: Farewell, Honda Zero. We never knew thee. Honda is cancelling its Zero Series SUV and Saloon, as well as the Acura RSX EVs, citing an "extremely challenging earnings situation." The Japanese automaker, which unsuccessfully tried to merge with Nissan last year, said it expected to make a net loss of ¥360 billion (~$2.5 billion) to […]

item.title: PEGI durcit ses règles : microtransactions et loot boxes vont peser sur la classification des jeux
item.description: Les éditeurs de jeux peuvent trembler, PEGI a revu son système de classification des jeux vidéo. L'organisme européen prend désormais mieux en compte les risques liés aux mécanismes modernes introduits avec le modèle free-to-play. Les microtransactions et les fameuses loot box vont peser lourd dans les classifications… et pousser, peut-être, à des changements dans certains jeux très populaires....

item.title: Testing AI is not like testing software and most companies haven't figured that out yet
item.description: Traditional software testing can't catch AI's unpredictable failures. Here's why humans are non-negotiable.

item.title: I think I can spot an AI fake, but the latest expert research suggests I'm wrong — here's why
item.description: AI images and videos are getting harder to spot, but there are ways to make sure we’re always looking out for them.

item.title: Experts reveal 'LeakyLooker' flaws let hackers gain access to user information in Google Looker Studio, so be on your guard
item.description: Nine bugs were found in Google's Looker Studio which could have allowed outside access.

item.title: The Foldable iPhone Might Be More Android-Like Than iPad
item.description: That's either a good thing or bad thing.

item.title: Microsoft is introducing Entra passkeys to Windows – so tough luck if your device is jailbroken, as your credentials will soon be gone forever
item.description: Microsoft is bringing Entra ID to Windows devices - but be careful, Microsoft Authenticator is scanning rooted or cracked devices and wiping credentials

item.title: 4K Blu-rays have big discounts in Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale — here are my 6 picks, all of which I've personally tested
item.description: There's a ton of discounted 4K Blu-rays as part of Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale, but I've picked my 6 favorites.

item.title: Newly Discovered Comet Could Appear During the Day—If It’s Not Destroyed First
item.description: Comet MAPS (C/2026 A1) is set for a dangerous brush with our star.

item.title: Soldes de printemps Dreame : il ne vous reste plus que quelques jours pour en profiter [Sponso]
item.description: Besoin d'un aspirateur, d'un TV flambant neuf ou d'un sèche-cheveux dernier cri ? Avec les soldes de printemps Dreame, vous pourrez trouver cela, et bien plus encore, à prix (très) réduit.

item.title: DDR5 RAM hits painful new high in pricing — and it looks like the relentless price-hike misery will continue
item.description: If you were hoping the RAM crisis was abating, sadly that isn't the case as DDR5 has never been more expensive.

item.title: Vous avez une Switch 2 ? Cette carte microSD de 512 Go à -41 % est un must have pour vos jeux
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour les joueurs sur Nintendo Switch 2 : la carte microSDXC Lexar Play Pro de 512 Go passe à 99 euros au lieu de 169 euros chez Fnac. Une belle baisse de prix pour ce modèle compatible avec le format exigé par la nouvelle console.

item.title: Once-overpriced iPhone Air and Galaxy S25 cases are now 90 percent off
item.description: It’s pretty easy to get an affordable phone case that looks good, no matter the device you have. Yet, that doesn’t stop some companies from selling theirs for about the same cost as a dinner for two. Well, thanks to Woot, we now have a wider selection of affordable phone cases to choose from, with […]

item.title: Dollar General closed hundreds of locations after evaluating its store footprint. But there’s an upside
item.description: The discount retailer saw a bump in sales for its most recent fiscal year. And despite recent closures, it also has more stores than it did last year. Dollar General’s fourth-quarter and full-year 2026 earnings report shows some successes—though you wouldn’t know that by the reaction of its stock.

item.title: Disney+ is rolling out its TikTok-like ‘Verts’ short-form video feed
item.description: Following the success of TikTok and Instagram Reels, Verts is designed to boost daily engagement and reach mobile-first viewers, all while increasing discovery across Disney+'s catalog.
